headline: Cummins (CMI) Stock After 131% Year Return Is The Rally Running Ahead Of Itself
summary: Wondering whether Cummins is still good value after a strong run, or if the stock is now pricing in too much optimism. The share price recently closed at US$716.86, with returns of 9.3% over 7 days, 8.7% over 30 days, 37.3% year to date and 131.2% over the past year, plus very large gains over 3 and 5 years. Recent headlines around Cummins have focused on its role in powertrain and energy solutions, and how it is positioned as demand patterns evolve across transportation and industrial...
